principle: AI models select fragments not pages — write self-contained paragraphs that can be lifted into an answer without editing
explanation: X.seo|fragment_selection: AI_overview_picks_fragments NOT whole_pages; fragment_must_be: thematically_relevant + internally_consistent + structurally_transparent; one_complete_thought_per_paragraph; NO:long_paragraphs_mixing_multiple_ideas NO:meaning_that_depends_on_surrounding_context eg: "paragraph_needing_3_previous_paragraphs_for_context" >> "self_contained_paragraph: definition + reason + example_in_one_block"

principle: Google AI Overview evaluates fragments on three criteria: topical relevance, content consistency, and structural transparency
explanation: X.seo|google_ai_criteria: 1_relevance == content_matches_query + chosen_answer_format; 2_consistency == no_contradictions + no_outdated_data + no_internal_conflicts; 3_transparency == paragraph_is_quotable_as_complete_thought; Google_first_picks_answer_FORMAT (definition/list/steps/summary) THEN finds_fragments_fitting_that_format; NO:contradictory_data NO:mixing_current_and_outdated_info eg: "page_says_both_yes_and_no_on_same_topic" >> "clear_single_position_with_evidence"

principle: Format each paragraph as a criterion, step, reason, definition, or conclusion — these patterns get cited by all three AI systems
explanation: X.seo|citable_formats: Bing_prefers: criteria + steps + causes + definitions + concise_conclusions; Google_prefers: structured_explanations + lists + summaries; all_three_systems_select_fragments_easy_to_embed_in_explanation; NO:rhetorical_questions NO:marketing_fluff_openings NO:vague_narrative eg: "Our_company_has_always_believed_in_quality..." >> "Criterion:_SSL_certificate_confirms_site_ownership_and_encrypts_data_transfer"

principle: High search position no longer guarantees traffic — AI answer absorbs clicks even from top-ranked pages not cited in it
explanation: X.seo|position_vs_traffic: AI_answer_at_top == absorbs_user_attention; page_at_position_1_but_not_in_AI_answer == loses_clicks; page_at_position_5_but_cited_in_AI_answer == gets_attention; new_metric: not_rank_but_fragment_inclusion_in_AI_response; NO:assuming_rank_equals_traffic NO:ignoring_AI_overview_impact eg: "rank_1_stable_but_traffic_dropped_30%" >> "check: is_AI_overview_active_for_this_query + is_your_fragment_included"
